title: BVA - Better Vanilla Animals
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05cd9e1a1ff7114e1bb7fae917bb8cc4f4637b6f.jpeg)

**OPTIFINE or ETF+EMF REQUIRED**

I decided to change the appearance of some mobs keeping the vanilla feel.
Most of the modified mobs are old or less detailed than the new mobs in new updates.

Some are not consistent like the chicken that looks like a duck or the baby cow with horns.

**Hope you enjoy! ;)**
